Introducing GPT‑Live

OpenAI finally upgraded the model used by ChatGPT voice mode!

I've had preview access for a few…

It also has the ability to spin off harder tasks to GPT-5.5:

For questions that require web search, deeper reasoning, or more complex work, it delegates to our latest frontier model behind the scen…
